emails.subject: Re: support on statistical modeling
emails.body: Re: support on statistical modeling Randall, The person supporting EBS in the Research Group is Martin Lin. I shall ask him to give you a call and will be glad to join you at the meeting with Martin. Vince From: Randall Hicks@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS on 04/04/2001 10:42 AM
